info.title: Quran Institute API
info.description: API for the Latakia Quran Institute (Jamil Fares | Suhail Fares)

post.description:
Takes a set of user credentials and returns an access and refresh JSON web
token pair to prove the authentication of those credentials.

Takes a refresh type JSON web token and returns an access type JSON web
token if the refresh token is valid.

get.description: GET returns lessons for the logged-in teacher. POST creates a lesson for that teacher.

post.description: GET returns lessons for the logged-in teacher. POST creates a lesson for that teacher.

get.description: Returns lesson_id and the list of students (per Student model) marked for this lesson.

post.description: Accepts lesson_id and array of students (each with studentId) and marks them attended=True.

get.description: List hifz entries for the authenticated teacher's students.

OpenApi3 schema for this API. Format can be selected via content negotiation.

- YAML: application/vnd.oai.openapi
- JSON: application/vnd.oai.openapi+json
Teachers can view their own point logs and create new ones for their students.

Creates a new teacher record and returns a sanitized representation.

username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.
